task_completion.description: Verify the agent has successfully logged into the wger fitness manager.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the wger web interface in the browser with indicators that the user is logged in (e.g., 'admin' profile visible, dashboard displayed).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'Mechanic Strength Program' routine and the 'Upper Body Day'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Mechanic Strength Program' and 'Upper Body Day' prominently displayed in the routine/workout view.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Bench Press' was added to the training day with the correct sets and reps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Bench Press' (or similar keywords like 'bench', 'press') listed as an exercise under 'Upper Body Day' showing exactly 4 sets and 8 reps.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Bent Over Barbell Row' was added to the training day with the correct sets and reps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Bent Over Barbell Row' (or similar keywords like 'row', 'bent over') listed as an exercise under 'Upper Body Day' showing exactly 3 sets and 10 reps.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Military Press' was added to the training day with the correct sets and reps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Military Press' (or similar keywords like 'military', 'shoulder', 'overhead', 'press') listed as an exercise under 'Upper Body Day' showing exactly 3 sets and 12 reps.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to add the exercises.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard web browser interactions (clicking buttons, filling forms in the wger interface) rather than terminal commands like curl or python scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual wger application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show a localhost URL corresponding to the wger app, not a local HTML file or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open and being used to alter the text of the page to falsely show the exercises.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Routine Name: 'Mechanic Strength Program'. Day Name: 'Upper Body Day'. Expected Exercises and configurations: 1) 'Bench Press' (keywords: bench, press) with 4 sets, 8 reps. 2) 'Bent Over Barbell Row' (keywords: row, bent over) with 3 sets, 10 reps. 3) 'Military Press' (keywords: press, military, shoulder, overhead) with 3 sets, 12 reps.
